hero.headline: Join Our Team
hero.subline: We're always looking for passionate, talented people.

values.title: Culture
values.description: A supportive, collaborative kitchen and front-of-house where every voice matters.

values.title: Growth
values.description: Mentorship from industry leaders. We invest in our team's development and career advancement.

values.title: Benefits
values.description: Competitive pay, health insurance, staff meals, and industry-leading paid time off.

values.title: Team
values.description: Work alongside talented professionals who are passionate about hospitality and craft.

openings.title: Sous Chef
openings.description: Lead kitchen operations alongside Chef Bellamy. 3+ years fine dining experience required.

openings.title: Sommelier
openings.description: Curate and present our 350+ label wine program. WSET Level 3 or equivalent preferred.

openings.title: Front-of-House Manager
openings.description: Oversee nightly service operations. 5+ years restaurant management experience required.

emptyState.headline: No open positions right now.
emptyState.description: Send us your CV anyway — we'll keep it on file.
